title: Module parameters of different bit-width get conflated

features.name: untyped parameter bit-width introspection with $bits
features.description: Code should include a module with an untyped parameter whose bit-width is inspected via $bits() inside the module body, verifying that the parameter width reflects the literal width supplied at instantiation

features.name: multiple instances with same numeric value but distinct parameter bit-widths
features.description: Code should include multiple instantiations of the same parameterized module where two instances use the same numeric parameter value but different bit-widths (e.g., 3'b010 and 2'b10), expecting them to be treated as distinct instances

features.name: parameterized module instantiation with zero-value literals of different widths
features.description: Code should include parameterized module instantiation with zero-value literals of different bit-widths (e.g., 3'b000 and 2'b00) so that distinct instances with distinct parameter widths are created, verifiable via $bits()
